transcript_preview: 6.27. Noklausies dialogus. Sakārtotos atbilstošajā secībā. Labdien! Labdien! Ko tu te dari? Pusdienoju. Bieži? Nē, reizēm. Labvakar! Labvakar! Ar ko es runāju? Ar mani, ar Agnesi. Sveika, Agnesi! Ko tu dari? Ēdu vakariņas. Kas uz sirds? Vai
translation_preview: 6.27 Listen to the dialogues. Arranged in the appropriate order. Hello! Hello! What are you doing here? Lunch. Often? No, sometimes. Good evening! Good evening! Who am I talking to? With me, with Agnese. Hi, Agnese! What are you doing? Eat
